# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for monitoring misconfiguration and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.api_key.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode=certificate
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.keystore.path=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elastic-certificates.p12
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.truststore.path=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elastic-certificates.p12
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elastic-certificates.p12
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.path=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elastic-certificates.p12
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
      - xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.collection.enabled=true
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - elasticsearch-certs:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9200:9200"
      - "127.0.0.1:9300:9300"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
        -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
        https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -q '"status":"green"\|"status":"yellow"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2g
          cpus: '2.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '0.5'
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=["https://elasticsearch:9200"]
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.username=logstash_system
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.password=${LOGSTASH_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeLogstash123!}
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authority=/usr/share/logstash/config/certs/ca.crt
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}
    volumes:
      - logstash-pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - logstash-config:/usr/share/logstash/config
      - elasticsearch-certs:/usr/share/logstash/config/certs:ro
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5044:5044"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/tcp"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '\"status\":\"green\"' || curl -s http://localhost:9600 | grep -q 'logstash'"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 90s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.5'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
          cpus: '0.25'
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - SERVER_NAME=kibana
      - SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeKibana123!}
      - ELASTICSEARCH_SSL_CERTIFICATEAUTHORITIES=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=true
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENCRYPTIONKEY=${KIBANA_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-a]3F9g#h$J!kL2mN4oP6qR8sT0uV1wX3yZ5aB7cD9eF}
      - XPACK_ENCRYPTEDSAVEDOBJECTS_ENCRYPTIONKEY=${KIBANA_SAVED_OBJECTS_KEY:-b]4G0h$K!lM3nO5pQ7rS9tU1vW2xY4zA6bC8dE0fG1h}
      - XPACK_REPORTING_ENCRYPTIONKEY=${KIBANA_REPORTING_KEY:-c]5H1i$L!mN4oP6qR8sT0uV2wX3yZ5aB7cD9eF0gH2i}
      - SERVER_SSL_ENABLED=true
      - SERVER_SSL_CERTIFICATE=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.crt
      - SERVER_SSL_KEY=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.key
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_IDLETIMEOUT=30m
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_LIFESPAN=8h
      - MONITORING_ENABLED=true
      - MONITORING_UI_CONTAINER_ELASTICSEARCH_ENABLED=true
      - CSP_STRICT=true
      - CSP_WARNLEGACYBROWSERS=true
      - XPACK_SECURITY_AUDIT_ENABLED=true
    volumes:
      - kibana-data:/usr/share/kibana/data
      - elasticsearch-certs:/usr/share/kibana/config/certs:ro
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -s --cacert /usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt https://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q 'available'"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
          cpus: '0.25'
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:8.12.0
    container_name: apm-server
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
      kibana:
        condition: service_healthy
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - NET_BIND_SERVICE
    command: >
      apm-server -e
        -E apm-server.host=0.0.0.0:8200
        -E apm-server.rum.enabled=true
        -E apm-server.rum.allow_origins=["${APM_RUM_ALLOW_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:*}"]
        -E apm-server.rum.allow_headers=["Content-Type","Authorization"]
        -E apm-server.auth.secret_token=${APM_SECRET_TOKEN:-ChangeMeAPMSecretToken123!}
        -E apm-server.ssl.enabled=true
        -E apm-server.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/apm-server.crt
        -E apm-server.ssl.key=/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/apm-server.key
        -E output.elasticsearch.hosts=["https://elasticsearch:9200"]
        -E output.elasticsearch.username=elastic
        -E output.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}
        -E output.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authorities=["/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt"]
        -E setup.kibana.host=https://kibana:5601
        -E setup.kibana.ssl.certificate_authorities=["/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt"]
        -E setup.kibana.username=elastic
        -E setup.kibana.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}
        -E monitoring.enabled=true
        -E monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=["https://elasticsearch:9200"]
        -E monitoring.elasticsearch.username=elastic
        -E monitoring.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}
        -E monitoring.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authorities=["/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt"]
        -E apm-server.auth.anonymous.enabled=false
        -E apm-server.max_event_size=307200
        -E apm-server.rate_limit.event_limit=300
        -E apm-server.rate_limit.ip_limit=1000
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-certs:/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs:ro
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8200:8200"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -s --cacert /usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt https://localhost:8200/ | grep -q 'publish_ready'"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512m
          cpus: '1.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 256m
          cpus: '0.25'
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk-setup
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-certs:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
    networks:
      - elk-network
    command: >
      bash -c '
        echo "Waiting for Elasticsearch to be ready...";
        until curl -s --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
          -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
          https://elasticsearch:9200 | grep -q "cluster_name"; do
          sleep 5;
        done;
        echo "Setting kibana_system password...";
        curl -s -X POST --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
          -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"
          https://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/kibana_system/_password
          -d "{\"password\":\"${KIBANA_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeKibana123!}\"}";
        echo "";
        echo "Setting logstash_system password...";
        curl -s -X POST --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
          -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"
          https://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/logstash_system/_password
          -d "{\"password\":\"${LOGSTASH_SYSTEM_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeLogstash123!}\"}";
        echo "";
        echo "Creating logstash_writer role...";
        curl -s -X POST --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
          -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"
          https://elasticsearch:9200/_security/role/logstash_writer
          -d "{\"cluster\":[\"manage_index_templates\",\"monitor\",\"manage_ilm\"],\"indices\":[{\"names\":[\"logstash-*\",\"logs-*\"],\"privileges\":[\"write\",\"create\",\"create_index\",\"manage\",\"manage_ilm\"]}]}";
        echo "";
        echo "Creating logstash_internal user...";
        curl -s -X POST --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
          -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeStrongPassword123!}"
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"
          https://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/logstash_internal
          -d "{\"password\":\"${LOGSTASH_INTERNAL_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeLogstashInternal123!}\",\"roles\":[\"logstash_writer\"],\"full_name\":\"Logstash Internal User\"}";
        echo "";
        echo "Setup complete!";
      '
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  elasticsearch-data:
    driver: local
  elasticsearch-certs:
    driver: local
  logstash-pipeline:
    driver: local
  logstash-config:
    driver: local
  kibana-data:
    driver: local

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
    internal: false
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
    driver_opts:
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_icc: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade: "true"
